articles.title: Dogecoin Competitor Shiba Inu Erupts, Hitting $10,000,000,000 Market Cap As Bitcoin and Ethereum Tap Resistance
articles.description: Capital in the crypto markets is shifting to meme coins as a new week kicks off.
